tasks.title: Create Login Screen
tasks.description: Login screen with email/password fields, remember me checkbox, forgot password link, and login button. Include social login options (Google, Apple) and link to signup screen.

tasks.title: Create Signup Screen
tasks.description: Signup screen with name, email, password, confirm password fields. Include Agent/Customer toggle, terms checkbox, and signup button. Link to login screen.

tasks.title: Update Agent Dashboard
tasks.description: Update Agent Dashboard to display incoming multi-property tour requests from customers. Agents need to see all properties requested in one go before Accepting/Rejecting.

tasks.title: Wire Complete Navigation Flow
tasks.description: Connect all screens: Home -> Scheduler -> Agent List -> Agent Detail -> Confirmation. Ensure back buttons and deep links work correctly.
